race.comment: ASTERN EFFORT (4) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing at his past four starts and strikes a very winnable contest here. Has placed two of three around this circuit and will be at peak fitness for this. Rates the testing material. WILIAMTHECONQUEROR (3) returned in good order with a close-up second here and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Looms as the main danger. DELICIOUS DEREK (6) had been plying his trade in harder Sydney races before just missing the frame here last time out. Respect from the champion Waller yard. The well-related TSZYUYA (10) (half to G2 winner Amazonian Lass) strips fitter third-up from the break and gets the reliable Gollan/Maloney combination. In the mix. RIGHTEOUS LEGEND (2) best of the rest with the claim from the low draw.
